events.bid_type_inference_note: classified formal per §G1 process-position fallback: submitted in response to the 2013-09-11 final-round announcement inviting binding proposals by 2013-09-18 and requiring merger-agreement markup.
events.source_quote: On September 18, 2013, CSC/Pamplona submitted a proposal for an all-cash purchase price of $20.75 per share.
